exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN Close>Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN Close<Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE Date >= '2018-01-01' AND Date <= '2018-12-31' AND "Index" IN ('IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE') GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN Close>Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN Close<Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE Date >= '2018-01-01' AND Date <= '2018-12-31' AND "Index" IN ('IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE') GROUP BY "Index";
